## Goal

One sentence describing the outcome.

## Scope

What is in scope and explicitly out of scope.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests or docs updated

## Suggested files / modules

- `path/to/module`

## Constraints

- Security, performance, or compatibility notes

## Priority

- [ ] P0 — foundational
- [ ] P1 — important
- [ ] P2 — enhancement

## AI implementation notes

- Tool/bot allowed: yes / no
- Requires human review before merge: yes
